subcodes.first_line: O leaf attracted to the Divine Threshold of Glory! Praise be to God, thou art a believer, art firm in faith, and art enkindled with the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه درگاه کبریاء الحمد لله مومنه ای و موقنه و باتش محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @nearness and remoteness, @love of God
